passages.text: Maria is a student. She lives in Madrid with her family. Every day, she gets up at seven o'clock and has breakfast. Then she goes to school by bus. She studies English and maths. She likes English because it is interesting. After school, she plays with her friends in the park. Yesterday, she played football and had a good time.

questions.question: How does Maria go to school?

passages.title: Maria is a student

passages.text: Tom and his sister Anna are at the supermarket. They want to buy food for a party. Tom gets some chips and chocolate. Anna gets fruit and juice. The party is for their mother's birthday. They are very happy because their mother loves parties. Tom has twenty dollars and Anna has fifteen dollars. They have enough money for everything.

questions.question: How much money does Tom have?

passages.title: Tom and his sister Anna are at the supermarket

passages.text: My city is small but very nice. There is a big park in the centre. Every weekend, families go there to walk and relax. There is also a museum and a library. I go to the library every Wednesday because I love reading. The library has many books for children and adults. My favourite place is the café near the park. It sells the best chocolate cake in the city.

questions.question: What is in the centre of the city?
When does the writer go to the library?
What is the writer's favourite place?

passages.title: My city is small but very nice
